description: Install YouTube MCP server for agent research access
commands: cd /tmp && git clone https://github.com/kirbah/mcp-youtube.git && cd mcp-youtube && npm install && npm link
echo 'YouTube MCP server installed. Configure YOUTUBE_API_KEY in .secrets/env'
requires: YouTube Data API v3 key — create at console.cloud.google.com (free tier, 10k queries/day)
